text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer—or should I say claw master! I've really learned a lot!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
So it's best to take a deep breath while the claw's
on the move... Is that perhaps the "wabi-sabi"
spirit?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Right! I'm going to train a bunch and get my skills
a little closer to the level of the claw master!
